name: Dashboard Intake
description: Populate the dashboard SQLite DB from primary sources every minute (the companion schedule pins * * * * * for a near-real-time Feed; terminal runs are swept by the scheduler's retention window). Four independent collectors run in parallel: runtime transcripts (daa), wiki+tastes frontmatter (knowledge_taste_changes + distribution), runtime hook logs (application_rate + breakdowns), brain agent-activity (captured/applied/workflow → delivery feed). Parameterized by {{python_path}} so a fresh `digital-me install --runtime dashboard` lands the same workflow against any user's intake venv.

variables.name: python_path
variables.description: Absolute path to a python3 with the dashboard_intake package installed (e.g. ~/.venvs/dashboard/bin/python3). The dashboard installer auto-supplies this.

variables.name: window_days
variables.description: How many days back from {{date}} the collectors should aggregate. Default 60 to keep the dashboard charts responsive on first install.

variables.name: dashboard_db
variables.description: Absolute path to the dashboard SQLite DB the intake should upsert into. The dashboard installer auto-supplies this (defaults to ~/.local/share/digital-me/dashboard/data/dashboard.db on a fresh install).

steps.name: Collect runtime session counts into daa
steps.promptTemplate: Counts unique sessions per agent_id per day across runtime transcript dirs (~/.claude/projects/, ~/.codex/sessions/, ~/.hermes/sessions/, ~/.openclaw/sessions/). Idempotent.

steps.name: Scan wiki/ + tastes/ → knowledge_taste_changes + distribution
steps.promptTemplate: Walks ~/digital-me/wiki/ and ~/digital-me/tastes/ frontmatter. Upserts daily (created/updated by domain) into knowledge_taste_changes; refreshes knowledge_taste_distribution snapshot. Idempotent.

steps.name: Derive M1 application_rate from hook logs
steps.promptTemplate: Reads ~/.claude/hooks/application_rate.log (and other runtimes' analogous logs), classifies surfaced/acted paths by tree prefix (wiki/ vs tastes/), upserts application_rate + application_rate_by_domain + application_rate_by_agent. Idempotent.

steps.name: Snapshot agent activity (brain + tastes) into the Feed
steps.promptTemplate: Merges four streams into the dashboard `activity` table: captured learnings (learning_captured traces joined to the learnings table), applied learnings (knowledge_surfaced m1 events), started workflows (non-cron goals) — all from the openclaw brain DB — plus distilled taste principles read from the tastes tree (~/digital-me/tastes), which is filesystem-sourced and runs even when the brain is absent. Upserts by source-event id, so re-runs over an overlapping window never duplicate cards.
